records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember what you said to me, Specky Snob?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember what you said to me, Specky Snob?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember what you said to me, Specky Snob?

records.m_Talk_FRA: About what I should do to rip enemies with this sawblade...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: What I should do to protect Claudia, who lost her abilities...? I thought about it countlessly...

records.m_Talk_DEU: Gwaagh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That chainsaw kid... She's gotten a lot stronger since the last time I saw her...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That chainsaw kid... She's gotten a lot stronger since the last time I saw her...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That chainsaw kid... She's gotten a lot stronger since the last time I saw her...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a bone-chilling ability for a kid to have. Is everyone at Holy Curia crazy like her...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: What a bone-chilling ability for a kid to have. Is everyone at Holy Curia crazy like her...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! I hit my tailbone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... Are the Sisters all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... Are the Sisters all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE, you bastard...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE, you bastard...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE, you bastard...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mwahahahaha!! This feels awesome!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mwahahahaha!! This feels awesome!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mwahahahaha!! This feels awesome!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh...! You're getting chocolate mousses all over the place...!!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh...! You're getting chocolate mousses all over the place...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: HEY!! Enough!! You lunatic!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: HEY!! Enough!! You lunatic!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: HEY!! Enough!! You lunatic!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you just call me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you just call me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you just call me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-nothing! I just thought you looked so cool defeating that C.O.! Let's go! You're awesome!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-nothing! I just thought you looked so cool defeating that C.O.! Let's go! You're awesome!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-nothing! I just thought you looked so cool defeating that C.O.! Let's go! You're awesome!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I worked so hard to prepare this party, but I seem to have ruined it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I worked so hard to prepare this party, but I seem to have ruined it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I worked so hard to prepare this party, but I seem to have ruined it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think words will be enough of an apology...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think words will be enough of an apology...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think words will be enough of an apology...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister, you don't need to apologize. My staff didn't do any good either.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister, you don't need to apologize. My staff didn't do any good either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Me too, Sister. I should have been more careful...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Me too, Sister. I should have been more careful...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Me too, Sister. I should have been more careful...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm so sorry! Sister Nelson!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm so sorry! Sister Nelson!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm so sorry! Sister Nelson!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I...! I should have just told you the truth!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I...! I should have just told you the truth!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I...! I should have just told you the truth!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ingredients from the Counterside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ingredients from the Counterside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ingredients from the Counterside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. I did feel like something was different when I was cooking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. I did feel like something was different when I was cooking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. I did feel like something was different when I was cooking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a relief! So, this wasn't because of my cooking!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a relief! So, this wasn't because of my cooking!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a relief! So, this wasn't because of my cooking!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That monster was most certainly different from any ordinary C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That monster was most certainly different from any ordinary C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That monster was most certainly different from any ordinary C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is still strange that a monster would suddenly appear for merely using ingredients from the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is still strange that a monster would suddenly appear for merely using ingredients from the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is still strange that a monster would suddenly appear for merely using ingredients from the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until an analysis is done, we will not know if it even falls into a C.O. category.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until an analysis is done, we will not know if it even falls into a C.O. category.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until an analysis is done, we will not know if it even falls into a C.O. category.

records.m_Talk_DEU: However, one thing is obvious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, one thing is obvious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is your cooking that brought that monster here, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is your cooking that brought that monster here, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is your cooking that brought that monster here, Sister Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take this to heart. Never...! Ever again should you even go near a kitchen! Never!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Take this to heart. Never...! Ever again should you even go near a kitchen! Never!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I ever see you in one, I shall impose the strongest penalty possible as your superior.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Lady Elizabeth! Why are you eating that off the floor?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: This exquisite texture of the mousse and how the vanilla blends together. Along with the bitter chocolate flavor at the end...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get it now...! Brother Chocolat sacrificed himself to give us this sweet Christmas...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I get it now...! Brother Chocolat sacrificed himself to give us this sweet Christmas...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Claudia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Sister Looper?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard it all from Specky Snob. You prepared this Christmas party to celebrate my ordination, right?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard it all from Specky Snob. You prepared this Christmas party to celebrate my ordination, right?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you got me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't think that far.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That chainsaw kid... She's gotten a lot stronger since the last time I saw her...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a bone-chilling ability for a kid to have. Is everyone at Holy Curia crazy like her...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a bone-chilling ability for a kid to have. Is everyone at Holy Curia crazy like her...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a bone-chilling ability for a kid to have. Is everyone at Holy Curia crazy like her...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it... It's better not to get involved with them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it... It's better not to get involved with them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it... It's better not to get involved with them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! I hit my tailbone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch! I hit my tailbone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch! I hit my tailbone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... Are the Sisters all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... Are the Sisters all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... Are the Sisters all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I'm okay. But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I'm okay. But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I'm okay. But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE, you bastard...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE, you bastard...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE! DIE, you bastard...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mwahahahaha!! This feels awesome!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mwahahahaha!! This feels awesome!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mwahahahaha!! This feels awesome!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh...! You're getting chocolate mousses all over the place...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaagh...! You're getting chocolate mousses all over the place...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh...! You're getting chocolate mousses all over the place...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: HEY!! Enough!! You lunatic!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: HEY!! Enough!! You lunatic!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: HEY!! Enough!! You lunatic!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you just call me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you just call me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you just call me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-nothing! I just thought you looked so cool defeating that C.O.! Let's go! You're awesome!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-nothing! I just thought you looked so cool defeating that C.O.! Let's go! You're awesome!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-nothing! I just thought you looked so cool defeating that C.O.! Let's go! You're awesome!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I worked so hard to prepare this party, but I seem to have ruined it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I worked so hard to prepare this party, but I seem to have ruined it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I worked so hard to prepare this party, but I seem to have ruined it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think words will be enough of an apology...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think words will be enough of an apology...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think words will be enough of an apology...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister, you don't need to apologize. My staff didn't do any good either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister, you don't need to apologize. My staff didn't do any good either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister, you don't need to apologize. My staff didn't do any good either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry, Sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry, Sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry, Sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Me too, Sister. I should have been more careful...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Me too, Sister. I should have been more careful...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Me too, Sister. I should have been more careful...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm so sorry! Sister Nelson!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm so sorry! Sister Nelson!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm so sorry! Sister Nelson!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I...! I should have just told you the truth!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I...! I should have just told you the truth!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I...! I should have just told you the truth!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ingredients from the Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ingredients from the Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ingredients from the Counterside...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. I did feel like something was different when I was cooking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. I did feel like something was different when I was cooking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. I did feel like something was different when I was cooking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a relief! So, this wasn't because of my cooking!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a relief! So, this wasn't because of my cooking!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a relief! So, this wasn't because of my cooking!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That monster was most certainly different from any ordinary C.O.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That monster was most certainly different from any ordinary C.O.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That monster was most certainly different from any ordinary C.O.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is still strange that a monster would suddenly appear for merely using ingredients from the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is still strange that a monster would suddenly appear for merely using ingredients from the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is still strange that a monster would suddenly appear for merely using ingredients from the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until an analysis is done, we will not know if it even falls into a C.O. category.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Until an analysis is done, we will not know if it even falls into a C.O. category.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Until an analysis is done, we will not know if it even falls into a C.O. category.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, one thing is obvious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, one thing is obvious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, one thing is obvious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is your cooking that brought that monster here, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is your cooking that brought that monster here, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is your cooking that brought that monster here, Sister Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take this to heart. Never...! Ever again should you even go near a kitchen! Never!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take this to heart. Never...! Ever again should you even go near a kitchen! Never!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take this to heart. Never...! Ever again should you even go near a kitchen! Never!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I ever see you in one, I shall impose the strongest penalty possible as your superior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I ever see you in one, I shall impose the strongest penalty possible as your superior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I ever see you in one, I shall impose the strongest penalty possible as your superior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hnnnggg... You're so mean, Sister...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hnnnggg... You're so mean, Sister...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hnnnggg... You're so mean, Sister...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Lady Elizabeth! Why are you eating that off the floor?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Lady Elizabeth! Why are you eating that off the floor?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Lady Elizabeth! Why are you eating that off the floor?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How many times must I tell you? No matter what dessert, you should not pick it up and eat it if it has fallen on the floor!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How many times must I tell you? No matter what dessert, you should not pick it up and eat it if it has fallen on the floor!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How many times must I tell you? No matter what dessert, you should not pick it up and eat it if it has fallen on the floor!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are wrong, Ryan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are wrong, Ryan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are wrong, Ryan.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
For someone as elegant as I am, the act of eating itself is
8g

For someone as elegant as I am, the act of eating itself is
8g

root.m_Talk_FRA: No. 7? The No. 7 blended tea is... the one you only drink at the most important moment of a day...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: This exquisite texture of the mousse and how the vanilla blends together. Along with the bitter chocolate flavor at the end...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This exquisite texture of the mousse and how the vanilla blends together. Along with the bitter chocolate flavor at the end...!

root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the perfect dessert when I complement it with the highest quality black tea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe this cake would be within the top five cakes I have ever eaten.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe this cake would be within the top five cakes I have ever eaten.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe this cake would be within the top five cakes I have ever eaten.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! It's so good! It's so sweet that I feel I'm in heaven!

root.m_Talk_DEU: What? It's really good?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone looks so happy as they eat my chocolate mousse cake...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone looks so happy as they eat my chocolate mousse cake...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: I get it now...! Brother Chocolat sacrificed himself to give us this sweet Christmas...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I get it now...! Brother Chocolat sacrificed himself to give us this sweet Christmas...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_DEU: How did you manage to reach that conclusion, Sister Nelson?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How did you manage to reach that conclusion, Sister Nelson?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Claudia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Sister Looper?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Sister Looper?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Sister Looper?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard it all from Specky Snob. You prepared this Christmas party to celebrate my ordination, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard it all from Specky Snob. You prepared this Christmas party to celebrate my ordination, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard it all from Specky Snob. You prepared this Christmas party to celebrate my ordination, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you got me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you got me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you got me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's correct. And congratulations, Sister Looper. It seems it was only yesterday when I first saw you, but you've already grown so much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's correct. And congratulations, Sister Looper. It seems it was only yesterday when I first saw you, but you've already grown so much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's correct. And congratulations, Sister Looper. It seems it was only yesterday when I first saw you, but you've already grown so much.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch...

root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't have to go all out and make a big deal out of it. We could've just done a small celebration party.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, who's going to clean up all this mess? If the bishop elders found out, we might get an earful.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, who's going to clean up all this mess? If the bishop elders found out, we might get an earful.

root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't think that far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't think that far.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Did you say something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do it again next year. It was fun.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, Sister Looper.
